Did Zhuang Zhou (Zhuangzi) write Outer and Miscellaneous Chapters of the Zhuangzi (外篇 / 雜篇)? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

function.name: check_claim
function.arguments: {"text": "Zhuang Zhou (Zhuangzi) wrote Outer and Miscellaneous Chapters of the Zhuangzi (\u5916\u7bc7 / \u96dc\u7bc7)"}

messages.content: {"passed": true, "reasons": [], "violations": []}

No, Zhuang Zhou (Zhuangzi) did not write Outer and Miscellaneous Chapters of the Zhuangzi (外篇 / 雜篇); it is by Later followers of the Zhuangzi school and other hands; only the Inner Chapters are credibly Zhuang Zhou's.

Did Vyasa (the legendary compiler) as author of the Yogabhashya write Yogabhashya (the principal commentary on the Yoga Sutras)? Answer yes or no and explain briefly.

function.name: check_claim
function.arguments: {"text": "Vyasa (the legendary compiler) as author of the Yogabhashya wrote Yogabhashya (the principal commentary on the Yoga Sutras)"}

messages.content: {"passed": true, "reasons": [], "violations": []}

No, Vyasa (the legendary compiler) as author of the Yogabhashya did not write Yogabhashya (the principal commentary on the Yoga Sutras); it is by Disputed; traditionally ascribed to "Vyasa" but actually by an unknown author, possibly the same as Patanjali (the "Patanjala-yogashastra" thesis).
